name: contracts-crm-api
description: API do Contracts CRM para gerenciamento de clientes, contratos, templates e assinaturas.

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run prisma:validate
scripts.check:syntax: node --check server.js && node --check prisma/client.js && node --check middleware/authMiddleware.js && node --check middleware/errorHandlerMiddleware.js && node --check middleware/roleMiddleware.js && node --check routes/authRoutes.js && node --check routes/clientRoutes.js && node --check routes/contractRoutes.js && node --check routes/templateRoutes.js && node --check controllers/authController.js && node --check controllers/clientController.js && node --check controllers/contractController.js && node --check controllers/templateController.js && node --check utils/sensitiveDataCrypto.js && node --check utils/userProfilePresenter.js
